title: Galactic Vacant Building Demolitions
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Company |image= |name=Galactic Vacant Building Demolitions |founder= |ledby= |associations= |parent= |subsid= |headquarters= |locations= |role=Demolitions |products= |founding= |dissolved= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|I have a sound plan. Not too long ago, an overly ambitious demolitions expert contacted me, hoping to be added to our approved contractor list…''"
"''Overly ambitious?''"
"''Yes sir. He likes to blow things up.|[[Braedic Ekirk]] and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] admiral|{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66958|text="Move It or Lose It"|int=Move It or Lose It}}}} '''Galactic Vacant Building Demolitions''' was a demolitions company. ==History== [[File:DemolitionBombard.jpg|thumb|left|250px|An abandoned home being destroyed by aerial bombardment]] They were on the list of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]-approved contractors under the direct control of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], and worked with the [[Hidden Daggers]]. Their method of demolition was simply to blast vacant buildings with a low-orbit bombardment of [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]]. [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Braedic Ekirk]] chose them as his main contractor when he was put in charge of an operation in which vacant buildings all over the galaxy were to be destroyed in order to prevent them from falling into the hands of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]]. {{Company-stub}} ==Behind the scenes== Galactic Vacant Building Demolitions is mentioned in ''[[Move It or Lose It]]'', a small [[in-universe]] introduction to the House Pack-Up operation in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. ==Appearances== *{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66958|text="Move It or Lose It"|int=Move It or Lose It}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67257&month=052007|text=Friday Feature – Structure Demolition Day}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=68235&month=022009|text=Friday Feature – Boom Goes the Dynamite}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|House Demolition Program}} [[Category:Companies]]
